  "findings": [
    "Staged conductors are undersized for the specified load and circuit length, which will result in excessive voltage drop and potential overheating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged conductors.",
    "Recalculate the required conductor size using NEC Table 310.16 and standard voltage drop formulas (limiting drop to 3% for branch circuits or 5% overall).",
    "Procure and stage the correctly sized larger gauge conductors before starting installation."
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged conductors do not meet the ampacity requirements when factoring in voltage drop over the circuit length. Installing them would violate code recommendations for efficiency and safety, and could damage connected equipment.",

    "NEC 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4"
  ]
